invariant.evidence: Trinity forced from O1 in derivation_01_trinity.md, quaternions from O2 in derivation_02_quaternion.md, spectral gap audit shows 2/3 emerges from self-consistency
invariant.weakness: spectral_gap_audit.py reveals 2/3 isn't universally forced, depends on operator choice

spectral.evidence: trinity_algebra.py computes eigenvalues, quaternion_spectral.py full spectral decomposition, spectral_gap_proof.py derives 2/3 gap
spectral.weakness: spectral gap calculation assumes specific transition probabilities not derived from observations

semantically_mappable.evidence: sensory_manifold.py maps Z3 to colors/geometry, Z2 to hue polarity, spectral gap to perfect fifth musical interval
semantically_mappable.weakness: mappings are suggestive but not proven unique or necessary

ouroboros.evidence: fixedpoint_algebra.py shows self-reference depth calculation, boundary as universal fixed point
ouroboros.weakness: self-encoding demonstrated abstractly but not concretely implemented

time_like.evidence: memory_algebra.py shift operators create sequences, spectral gap drives irreversible decay at rate (2/3)^n
time_like.weakness: no explicit time parameter or clock mechanism shown

space_like.evidence: quaternion_algebra.py Hamming distance, surface_algebra.py embeds structures on manifolds
space_like.weakness: locality structure basic, no metric space properly defined

physics_like.evidence: conservation_algebra.py derives CL1-CL3 from observations, charge conservation verified, Noether correspondence shown
physics_like.weakness: conservation shown to fail in evolution test, only works modulo 3

logic_gated.evidence: quaternion_algebra.py binary states (0,0),(1,0),(0,1),(1,1) with Boolean operations
logic_gated.weakness: gates mentioned but not explicitly implemented as computational units

self_recursive.evidence: fixedpoint_algebra.py fixed points, distinction operator cycles with period 3
self_recursive.weakness: recursion depth limited, no infinite regress handling

living_state.evidence: memory_algebra.py shows evolution dynamics, boundary absorption creates decay
living_state.weakness: no entropy calculation, no free energy, thermodynamics claimed but not computed

discrete_continuous_bridge.evidence: topology_algebra.py Z3 embeds in U(1) as cube roots, Q8 in SU(2), comprehensive surface embeddings
discrete_continuous_bridge.weakness: embeddings shown but continuity of mappings not proven

llm_integrable.evidence: llm_bridge.py maps to 768D embeddings, preserves algebraic structure
llm_integrable.weakness: no actual LLM integration demonstrated, just dimension matching

maps_known_structures.evidence: Z3, Q8, U(1), SU(2), SO(3) all explicitly identified and mapped
maps_known_structures.weakness: isomorphisms claimed but not all rigorously proven

dimensionless_ratios.evidence: 2/3 spectral gap, ratios derived not assumed, all pure numbers
dimensionless_ratios.weakness: some physical interpretations smuggle dimensional thinking

unit_sphere_grounded.evidence: U(1) unit circle, SU(2) unit quaternions, explicit normalization shown

shape_memory.evidence: shape_memory.py elastic deformation with spring constant 2/3, recovery demonstrated
shape_memory.weakness: implementation basic, no complex deformation paths tested

topological_spectral.evidence: winding numbers give spectrum, graph Laplacian in quaternion_spectral.py
topological_spectral.weakness: connection more stated than deeply proven

smuggled_constants: some matrix dimensions chosen for convenience not derived
llm_scores.overall_assessment: Strong mathematical derivations from first principles with genuine forced structures (Z3, Q8), but some properties overclaimed especially thermodynamic interpretations, and spectral gap 2/3 shown to depend on operator choice not purely forced.
